scripts.prepare-data: mkdir -p docs/public/benchmarks-data && for zip in benchmarks/backtest-result-*.zip; do [ -f "$zip" ] || continue; base="$(basename "${zip%.zip}")"; echo "Extracting $base.json..."; unzip -p "$zip" "${base}.json" > "docs/public/benchmarks-data/${base}.json"; done
scripts.docs:dev: npm run prepare-data && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: npm run prepare-data && vitepress build docs
